issues.message: Font sizes below the legibility floor (~71px for a 1920px-tall canvas): 48px, 54px, 56px, 60px. Raise body text to >= the floor and titles well above it, or it won't read at phone size.
14 distinct chromatic colors in the composition — aim for <= 3-5 on screen at once. Re-check each scene: background least-saturated, one accent that reads first.
